rounds: Lavendra with the necklace, black bag, and Noskin loafers — full look, his actual people, no armour. That one goes to Matt, and it's not close. Pink toes held all week and the Balmoral thong was an active choice, not an accident — Himbo approved, obviously. But the poncho at Balmoral? Joy police got that one. Brave choice, zero exposure — they'll take it. The wetsuit moment with the swim group is the real tell: strangers, fine. His people, that's where they're still loud.
pattern: They're quiet with strangers, loud with his actual people — the ones whose opinions actually land.
